# Project One-Pager Template

Use this template during the [Project Initiation](../octoacme-project-initiation.md) phase to validate the business need and gain stakeholder alignment before moving into planning.

---

## Project Name
<!-- A short, recognizable name for the initiative -->

## Problem Statement
<!-- Describe the customer or business problem this project addresses. What pain point exists today? -->

## Objective / Goal (SMART)
<!-- Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, Time-bound goal statement -->

## Success Metrics
<!-- How will you measure whether this project succeeded? List 2–4 quantifiable metrics. -->
| Metric | Baseline | Target | Measurement Method |
|--------|----------|--------|--------------------|
|        |          |        |                    |

## Primary Stakeholders
| Name / Role | Interest / Influence | Communication Preference |
|-------------|----------------------|--------------------------|
|             |                      |                          |

## Directly Responsible Individual (DRI)
<!-- Single named owner accountable for the project outcome -->
- **DRI:**
- **PM:**
- **PdM:**

## Suggested Timeline & Milestones
| Milestone | Target Date | Owner |
|-----------|-------------|-------|
| Initiation approved |  |  |
| Planning complete |  |  |
| First shippable increment |  |  |
| Final release |  |  |

## Quick Risks & Dependencies
| Risk / Dependency | Impact | Likelihood | Mitigation |
|-------------------|--------|------------|------------|
|                   |        |            |            |

> For full risk tracking, use the [Risk Register Template](../checklists/risk-register-template.md).

## Proposed Team / Roles
| Role | Person / Team | Estimated Effort |
|------|---------------|------------------|
|      |               |                  |

## Out of Scope
<!-- Explicitly list what this project will NOT address to prevent scope creep -->

## Decision Gate
- [ ] Success metrics are clearly defined
- [ ] Stakeholders agree on priority
- [ ] Team availability confirmed
- [ ] DRI assigned
- [ ] Sponsor sign-off received

---

*Template version: 1.0 — Refer to the [Project Initiation Guide](../octoacme-project-initiation.md) for process guidance.*
